summary: Frontend-only cosmetic/testid iteration validated. Login, testid alignment (nav-painel/mobile-nav-painel/more-nav-painel), Lançamentos redesigned Filtros bar + Limpar button, Reports DeltaCards + year select, regression (new tx, tx-repeat-select, theme-toggle), mobile Mais menu, and receipt upload/remove all working. No functional regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: Transactions.jsx is ~628 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider extracting the filter bar and dialog into subcomponents.

Reports.jsx uses `year` state initialized as number but reports-year-select option values are strings; strict equality on <select value={year}> depends on React string coercion — works but a code smell.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test transaction (TEST_receipt_upload, €0.01) to validate receipt upload/remove; cleaned up afterwards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cosmetic iteration passed cleanly. All previous testids preserved plus new: nav-painel/mobile-nav-painel/more-nav-painel, clear-filters-btn. Filtros header + labeled grid confirmed on /lancamentos. DeltaCards with percent pill and 'vs prev year' text confirmed on /relatorios.
